response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with diverse experience in various technologies and leadership roles. They have worked on projects involving AI and cloud technologies, and have demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with GISCollective.
strengths: Diverse experience in software development across multiple technologies
Entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source Geo-Data platform
Strong background in test-driven development and software craftsmanship
concerns: Lack of direct experience in AI strategy or cloud platform strategy
Most experience is in software development rather than engineering leadership or director-level roles
Location in Kenya may be a logistical consideration

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct AI strategy experience
